CROSS COMPLAINANT THE MILLENNIUM TOWER ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION is DENIED. See Exhibit B to Hansen declaration.
